summary: Prepared conservative non-mutating classifications for the live PR inventory shard using the provided hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, fix PRs, or closeouts are planned because the job disables merge/fix/raise_pr and low-signal/instant closeout is not enabled.

actions.reason: Focused active contributor bug-fix PR with dirty merge state and failed review infrastructure needs maintainer/review follow-up rather than inventory automation.

First-time contributor feature PR has failed proof/checks and unresolved product/technical review, so it requires maintainer judgment rather than closeout or fix planning.
Broad provider feature PR with failed proof and lint/bundling checks needs maintainer product and technical review; no inventory closeout is safe.
